---
title: "MP027: Specialized Natural SQL Language"
subtitle: "NSQL 以支援專案特定命令、領域操作和慣用工作流程"
author: "Claude"
date: "2025-04-04"
date-modified: "2025-08-17"
categories: [meta-principle, query-language, domain-specific-language, SNSQL]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
crossref:
  chapters: true
---

## Core Concept

[This principle needs to be translated from the Chinese version]

## Key Principles

1. **Principle 1**: [To be added]
2. **Principle 2**: [To be added]
3. **Principle 3**: [To be added]

## Implementation Guidelines

[Implementation details to be added]

## Examples

```r
# Example code to be added
```

## Related Principles

## Benefits

1. **Benefit 1**: [To be added]
2. **Benefit 2**: [To be added]
3. **Benefit 3**: [To be added]

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Checklist item 1
- [ ] Checklist item 2
- [ ] Checklist item 3

## Conclusion

[Conclusion to be added]
